outputs.description: This field is specific to Intelligence Alert and provides a summarised context, for example, 'The worldwide COVID-19 outbreak...' IAIR.last_published The last published timestamp of the IA/IR, for example, '2020-06-26T01:14:56.000Z'
outputs.name: IAIR.abstract

outputs.description: The index timestamp of the IA/IR, for example, '2022-02-11T17:24:03.604Z' IAIR.display_text The display text of the IA/IR, for example, 'SITREP Cybersecurity Risks Related to COVID-19'
outputs.name: IAIR.index_timestamp

outputs.description: The value of the IA/IR, for example, '8b8b48f1-92a0-411a-a073-3241f6819f8b' IAIR.last_modified The last modified timestamp of the IA/IR, for example, '2022-02-11T17:21:48.000Z'
outputs.name: IAIR.value

outputs.description: The threat type of the IA/IR, for example, '- Hacktivism- Cyber Espionage- Cyber Crime- Vulnerability'. It's formatted in such a way that it gets displayed better. IAIR.created_on The creation timestamp of the IA/IR, for example, '2020-03-12T22:22:25.000Z'
outputs.name: IAIR.threat_types

outputs.description: The title of the IA/IR, for example, 'SITREP Cybersecurity Risks Related to COVID-19' IAIR.type The type of report i.e. an IA/IR , for example, 'intelligence_alert'
outputs.name: IAIR.title

outputs.description: The uuid of the IA/IR, for example, '8b8b48f1-92a0-411a-a073-3241f6819f8b' IAIR.analysis The analysis of the IA/IR, for example, 'COVID-19 Introduces Cyberthreat Opportunities...'
outputs.name: IAIR.uuid

outputs.description: Provides with the document links related to the Intelligence Alert. This field is specific to Intelligence Alert, for example, ' https://intelgraph.idefense.com/rest/files/download/ ...'
outputs.name: IAIR.attachment_links

outputs.description: Provides severity rating. This field is specific to Intelligence Alert, for example, '4' IAIR.mitigation Provides info on how to mitigate. This field is specific to Intelligence Alert, for example, '## Expert, Experienced Advice Will be CriticalTo minimize targeting opportunities...'
outputs.name: IAIR.severity

outputs.description: Provides conclusion of the report. This field is specific to Intelligence Report IAIR.summary Provides with a summary of the report. This field is specific to Intelligence Report.
outputs.name: IAIR.conclusion

outputs.description: Provides with the dynamic properties related to the intelligence alert/report. IAIR.links Provides details of the linked fields related to the intelligence alert/report.
outputs.name: IAIR.dynamic_properties

outputs.description: Provides with external sources related to the intelligence alert/report. DBotScore.Indicator The indicator that was tested.
outputs.name: IAIR.sources_external

outputs.description: Reliability of the source providing the intelligence data. DBotScore.Type The indicator type.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Reliability

outputs.description: The vendor that was used to calculate the score. DBotScore.Score The actual score.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Vendor
